210 g/m² , 97% AriPam 3% Elasthane, Ripstop Woven Fabric

97% AriPam 3% Elasthane ripstop fabric. It is used mostly for outdoor wear as pants. AriRipstop can also be used for workear stretchable raincoats. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Outdoor Elastic Pants Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Technical Documents >> AriRipstop El Data Sheet Certificates
